title: Multi-Wallet Portfolio Aggregator
description: Enter multiple wallet addresses and see combined token balances, total net worth, and unified transaction feed — your whole onchain life in one view.
useCase: Build a household/team portfolio dashboard that aggregates assets across multiple wallets and shows combined USD net worth, per-wallet breakdown, and top holdings.

keyParams.walletAddresses: Array of 0x wallet addresses to aggregate across
keyParams.chainName: EVM chain name — or use multichain endpoint to auto-discover all chains
